title: RoleplayOptimized
description: This is an unofficial optional modpack for MassiveCraft.com!
body:
Roleplay Optimized is an unofficial Modpack intended for MassiveCraft's Roleplay server. The various optimization mods and quality-of-life features are all intended to replace the features of optifine, improve performance for players on the server, and add some nice features to enhance the roleplay experience.

**Features**:
- Custom entity models, various animals and creatures can be seen as intended.
- Dynamic surrounding ambiance, immerse yourself in the world around you with bird song and fireflies. 
- Shader support!
- Figura, let people see your character the way you want them to be seen.
- Removed loading screen/resourcepack loading screen for quicker access to the server. 
- Entity culling and game optimization! Say goodbye to dropped frames during roleplay events!
